source_pr.title: *: fix race and enable race for concurrent ddl test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #38063

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: DATA RACE risk: `MockSessionManager` iterates over `msm.conn` without holding its mutex, which can race with concurrent updates in concurrent DDL tests.
failure_signature: DATA RACE: `testkit/mocksessionmanager.go` concurrent access to `msm.conn` (race detector).
root_cause_explanation: `MockSessionManager` accesses shared state (`msm.conn` / txn info) from multiple goroutines in concurrent DDL tests. The patch fixes a race by adding proper locking around iterations/access (Lock/Unlock or defer Unlock) in methods like `ShowProcessList`, `ShowTxnList`, and `CheckOldRunningTxn`, and enables `-race` for the concurrent DDL test target.
fix_pattern: Protect `MockSessionManager` shared state with a mutex when iterating/accessing (`msm.mu.Lock()/Unlock()`), and enable race testing for concurrent DDL tests.

evidence: evidence: *: fix race and enable race for concurrent ddl test
